new_jobs.title: Payment Collection Officer (Female is preferable)
new_jobs.description:
About City Connect ICT Services
CityConnect is a Kabul-based internet service provider that has been delivering reliable connectivity solutions across Afghanistan for over 10 years. With a strong focus on quality service, customer satisfaction, and technological innovation, CityConnect has built a solid reputation in the market. The company is committed to expanding its network infrastructure and providing stable, high-speed internet services to businesses and individuals throughout the country.

Job Description
Payment Collection & Follow-ups:
Contact customers and visits to remind them of overdue payments.
Follow up on unpaid invoices and ensure timely collection of outstanding amounts.
Maintain proper records of collections and pending payments/ invoices.
Customer Interaction & Support:
Address customer inquiries regarding their bills, payment methods, and outstanding balances.
Negotiate payment plans with customers who face financial difficulties.
Provide receipts and ensure smooth transactions.
Billing & Account Management:
Verify customer account details and ensure billing accuracy.
Coordinate with the relevant authority to resolve any discrepancies.
Keep records of defaulters and escalate cases as needed.
Legal & Recovery Process:
Work with legal teams for the recovery of long-overdue payments.
Issue warnings and final notices to non-paying customers.
Recommend disconnection of services for defaulters.
Feedback & Coordination:
Work closely with the finance and sales teams to improve collection efficiency.
Provide feedback on customer behavior and potential risks.

Job Requirements
1. High school is required
2. Ability to handle difficult customers professionally.
3. Self-motivated with an ability to achieve 100% targets/ collections.
4. Must be quite enough familiar in Kabul City.
5. The candidate must be able to ride a motorbike in Kabul city for payment collections.
6. Strong negotiation and communication skills.
7. Attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.
8. Basic understanding of legal procedures related to debt collection
9. Fluency in local languages i.e. Pashto / Dari is required. knowledge of English language is an Asset.
10. at least one year of experience in payment collections or accounts receivable (preferably in an ISP or telecom company)

Submission Guideline
Applicants meeting the above requirements are requested to apply for this vacancy through email stated above only.
Important Notes:
1. Please attach your CV and Tazkira for further screening purpose.
2. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for further assessment.

Submission Email
hr@cityconnect.af

details.Experience: Must have at least 2 years experience at Internet Service Provider Company
details.Education: 12 Grade or Bachelor degree is desirable.
details.Years of Experience: Must have at least 2 years experience at Internet Service Provider Company

new_jobs.title: IP Network Engineer
new_jobs.category: Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
انجام امور تخنیکی ترانسمیشن نظربه لزوم دید و ضروریات اداره

Duties and Responsibilities
· تهیه و ترتیب گزارشات منظم و پربودیک در مورد عملکرد شبکه ترانسمیشن.
· نظارت و کنترول تخنیکی از شبکه ترانسمیشن (مایکروویف)
· کنفگربشن در انواع مختلف تجهیزات ترانسمیشن (مایکروویف)
· نصب و مونتاژ لینک های مایکرویف و سایر تجهیزات ترانسمیشن
· نظارت و هماهنگی در تهیه انواع عملکردها / اطلاعات مربوط به بهره برداری و نگهداری از شبکه ترانسمیشن
· اطمینان از مناسب وصحت بودن گزارشات و حفظ و کنترول آن مطابق با قوانین و مقررات تخنیکی مخابراتی
· همکاری با دیپارتمنت های ذیدخل در حل مشکلات پیش آمده و فعال نمودن سایت های جدید
· اجرای امور تخنیکی پروژه های ترانسمیشن با مسئولیت کامل جهت به اکمال تمام اهداف معینه
· سایر وظایف را که از طرف مدیر دیپارتمنت برایش هدایت داده میشود.

Job Requirements
تحصیلات : حداقل داشتن سند تحصیلی در یکی از رشته­های انجنیری مخابرات وتکنالوجی معلوماتی،انجنیری الکترونیکی.
تجارب : داشتن حداقل 7 سال تجربه کاری در بخش ترانسمیشن
مهارت های دیگر:
1. تسلط به زبان­های(پشتو،دری وانگلیسی) و آشنایی تحریر و تکلم با زبان های متذکره.
2. مهارت­های کمپیوتری مانند( word, Excel, Access )و سایر سافت ویر های تخنیکی مرتبط به یرنامه های ترانسمیشن و مخابراتی.
3. آشنای کامل باطرح ودیزاین َو چگونگی کارکردگی شبکه های GSM و Transmission .
4. مهارتهای عالی در کار تیمی و همکاری های همه جانبه باهمکاران.
5. آشنایی کامل با سافتویر (نرم افزار) های لنک های مایکروویف و سیستم NMS آنها.

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (IP Network Eng-002) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

details.Functional Area: Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology

new_jobs.title: Business Development Officer
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه:
هدف از این وظیفه، توسعه بازار، شناسایی و جذب فرصتهای جدید تجاری، مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا ، و
حمایت از رشد عواید شرکت در سطح ولایات میباشد. شخص منتخب مسئول توسعه شبکه مشتریان، ایجاد فرصتهای
همکاری، و تقویت جایگاه شرکت در بازار خواهد بود.

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیتها :
کارمند توسعه تجارت (Business Development Officer) تحت رهنمود مدیر بخش توسعه تجارت فعالیت نموده ومسئولیتهای ذیل را بر عهده خواهد داشت:
توسعه بازار و جذب مشتریان (Business Acquisition):
شناسایی، تحلیل وجذب مشتریان جدید) MSP ها، تجار، شرکتها
ایجاد و توسعه فرصتهای تجاری در مناطق هدف.
معرفی خدمات و راهکارهای شرکت به مشتریان بالقوه .
پیگیری مستمر فرصتها تا مرحله نهایی (conversion).
مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا ) Client & Partner Management):
ایجاد وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان، شرکا و ذینفعان.
مدیریت جلسات حضوری و آنلاین جهت توسعه همکاریها .
پیگیری نیازمندیهای مشتریان و ارائه راه حل های مناسب.
تحلیل بازار و فرصتها (Market Analysis):
انجام تحقیقات بازار و تحلیل رقبا در بخش FinTech و خدمات مالی دیجیتال .
شناسایی فرصتهای جدید تجاری و پیشنهاد به مدیریت .
جمعآوری معلومات از بازار و ارائه گزارشهای تحلیلی .
هماهنگی داخلی و پشتیبانی فروش (Sales Coordination):
هماهنگی با تیمهای تخنیکی، عملیات، مالی و مارکیتینگ جهت پیشبرد فرصتها .
همکاری در تهیه پروپوزلها، پریزنتیشنها واسناد تجاری.
اطمینان از تطبیق درست خدمات برای مشتریان جدید .
بازاریابی و تقویت برند (Marketing & Visibility):
حمایت از فعالیتهای بازاریابی در سطح ولایات .
مشارکت در معرفی خدمات از طریق ایونتها، جلسات و بازدیدها .
جمعآوری بازخورد بازار برای بهبود خدمات .
گزارشدهی و مستندسازی (Reporting & Documentation):
ثبت و مدیریت معلومات مشتریان، فرصتها و فعالیتها .
ارائه گزارشهای منظم از فعالیتها.
مستندسازی جلسات، توافقات و پیشرفتها .
تحویلات (Deliverables):
دستیابی به اهداف تعیینشده در جذب مشتریان وتوسعه بازار.
ایجاد و مدیریت فعال فرصتهای تجاری.
ارائه گزارشهای منظم از فعالیتها، فرصتها و نتایج .
توسعه وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان و شرکا کلیدی.

Job Requirements
صلاحیتها و مهارتهای مورد نیاز
شایستگیهای عمومی :
توانایی توسعه بازار و ایجاد فرصتهای تجاری در محیطهای رقابتی .
مهارت قوی در برقراری ارتباط، مذاکره و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا.
توانایی کار مستقل همراه با تمرکز بر اهداف و نتایج (target-driven).
انعطاف پذیری و توانایی انجام سفرهای کاری در ولایات .
تحصیلات و تجربه :
حداقل لیسانس در رشتههای اداره تجارت، مالی، اقتصاد، تکنالوژی معلوماتی یا رشتههای مرتبط .
حداقل ۵–۳ سال تجربه کاری در بخش توسعه تجارت، فروش، یا مارکیتینگ)ترجیحا در FinTech ، بانکداری یا
ICT .)
داشتن تجربه عملی در جذب مشتریان، مدیریت روابط، و دستیابی به اهداف فروش

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان علاقه مند میتوانند سیوی ) CV ( خود را با ذکر تجربه های کاری مرتبط به ایمیل آدرس زیر ارسال نمایند:
hr@naqdpay.af

expiring_today.title: Business Developer & Market Linkage Officer
expiring_today.company: (CHA), Coordination of Humanitarian Assistance موسسه همکاری
expiring_today.description:
About (CHA), Coordination of Humanitarian Assistance موسسه همکاری
Coordination of Humanitarian Assistance (CHA) is a non-governmental, non-profitable, and non-political Afghan NGO, working since 1987 mainly in agriculture, health, education, and infrastructure sectors in more vulnerable areas of the country. CHA is working through the implementation of Emergency, rehabilitation, and development projects for emergency aid for war, famine, and natural disaster-affected families in the field, to assist with the rehabilitation of rural and urban life, and to work with communities for sustainable development in Afghanistan.
Core Commitments and Expectations from Candidates:
CHA is dedicated to creating an environment where all staff members are committed to our core values and principles. We believe that our employees play a crucial role in maintaining the integrity and excellence of our organization. Therefore, we have outlined the following core commitments and expectations that all candidates must adhere to:
Adherence to CHA's Policies and Procedures: All candidates must adhere to CHA's policies and procedures, these guidelines are designed to ensure a safe, fair, and efficient working environment. Compliance with these policies is fundamental to maintaining the standards and quality of our operation
Protection from Sexual Exploitation and Abuse (PSEA): CHA has zero tolerance for sexual exploitation, sexual harassment and abuse. All candidates, employees, associates, and partners must comply with the PSEA policy.
Ethical Conduct and Integrity: Candidates are expected to maintain high standards of ethical conduct and integrity in all their professional dealings. This includes avoiding conflicts of interest, maintaining confidentiality, and adhering to anti-fraud and anti-corruption guidelines​​.
Commitment to Non-Discrimination and Diversity: CHA is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment. Candidates must respect and promote diversity and non-discrimination based on race, gender, age, or any other protected characteristic​​.
Child Protection: Candidates must adhere to the Child Protection Policy, ensuring the safety and well-being of children in all CHA activities.
Environmental and Social Safeguards: Candidate must follow CHA's Environmental and Social Safeguard Policy to minimize environmental impact and ensure sustainable practices in all projects and operations​​.
Confidentiality and Data Protection: Candidates are required to maintain the confidentiality of all CHA data and information.
All selected candidates will be expected to adhere to these standards and principles. To ensure compliance, candidates will undergo rigorous reference and background checks. These checks will include the verification of academic credentials and employment history. Selected candidates may also be required to provide additional information to facilitate these checks.
By joining CHA, candidates commit to these core values and contribute to our mission of providing humanitarian assistance with the highest level of integrity and professionalism. We look forward to welcoming dedicated individuals who share our commitment to making a positive impact.

Job Description
• Develop and regularly update work plans and implementation schedules for all livelihood-related projects.
• Lead and oversee the execution of MSME development, carpet weaving, value chain strengthening, teacher training, computer learning, and cash-for-work initiatives.
• Provide technical expertise, guidance, and mentoring to project teams, trainers, and implementing partners.
• Coordinate closely with provincial teams, government departments, local authorities, and community leaders, while maintaining strong collaboration with UNHCR focal points on planning, reporting, and monitoring.
• Monitor project activities to ensure quality, effectiveness, sustainability, and timely delivery.
• Collect, analyze, and document data, success stories, and beneficiary feedback for inclusion in reports.
• Prepare and submit high-quality progress reports (weekly, monthly, and quarterly) in line with project manager and donor (UNHCR) requirements.
• Strengthen the capacity of field staff through technical support and ongoing mentoring.
• Conduct other relevant tasks and duties

Job Requirements
• Bachelor’s degree in Agriculture, and business administration(Master’s degree strongly preferred).
• Minimum of 5 years of proven experience in implementing livelihood programs, particularly MSME and agriculture-focused initiatives.
• Preference will be given to candidates from the relevant provinces.
• Demonstrated experience working with returnees, IDPs, and vulnerable groups in complex and challenging contexts.
• Strong technical knowledge of MSME development, carpet weaving, value chain strengthening, teacher training, computer literacy, and cash-for-work programming.
• Prior experience with UNHCR-funded projects or other international donor-funded programs is highly desirable.
• Proficiency in English, Dari, and Pashto.
• Excellent communication, coordination, and report-writing skills.
• Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving abilities.
• Willingness and ability to travel regularly to field sites across the northern provinces.

Submission Guideline
Interested and qualified candidates should send us their information using the link below.
https://manage.cha-net.org/jobs/69f1f0d807ef81075da21324
for more information please contact to this number: 0729128571

Submission Email
Please use the above link in the Submission Guideline section

expiring_today.title: IT Officer NOC Engineer - Night Shift
expiring_today.description: Role Summary To serve as the frontline guardian of Setaragan Mutahed’s high-volume Airtime Top-Up infrastructure and StarPay EMI. This role ensures 24/7 availability of critical financial transactions and telecommunication links. You will monitor production systems, mitigate real-time payment failures, and ensure that overnight batch settlements and EMI reconciliations are processed without error, providing a seamless experience for thousands of agents and end-users. Duties and Responsibilities • Continuous Infrastructure & Transaction Monitoring: Proactively monitor core infrastructure, server health, and network links. Use approved tools to track the real-time flow of Top-Up transactions and StarPay EMI payments, identifying any latency or drops in success rates. • L1 Incident Triage & FinTech Troubleshooting: Perform immediate first-level triage on system alarms. For payment failures or "timeout" errors, collect critical evidence (API logs, transaction IDs, screenshots) and execute approved runbooks to restore service. • Critical Escalation Management: Act as the primary point of contact during the night shift. Escalate high-severity incidents (e.g., core database downtime, ISP link failure, or payment gateway outages) to on-call Tier-2 engineers or vendor support (MNOs/Banks) according to the strict Escalation Matrix. • Rigorous Ticketing & Shift Handover: Document every incident in the Jira/Ticketing system with high precision. Provide a comprehensive Morning Handover Report detailing pending issues, vendor tickets, and critical status updates to the daytime operations team. • Operational Health Checks: Conduct routine checks on server CPU/RAM, disk usage, and service statuses. Ensure all scheduled automated jobs and security backups are completed, reporting any exceptions immediately to prevent morning backlog. • Overnight Batch & EMI Reconciliation: Verify the successful execution of overnight batch reconciliation jobs between StarPay and partner banks. Manually trigger or report failures in settlement processes to ensure financial data integrity for the next business day. • Network & ISP Coordination: Support basic network troubleshooting (link down, packet loss) affecting agent connectivity. Coordinate directly with local ISPs and MNO partners (AWCC, Roshan, Etisalat, MTN, Salaam) to resolve connectivity issues affecting the Top-Up platform. • Compliance & Security Adherence: Maintain absolute confidentiality of sensitive financial and customer data. Follow strict Access Control Procedures and Zero-Change Policy—do not perform unauthorized system changes or configuration updates during the shift. Job Requirements • Education: Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Software Engineering. • Experience: 1–3 years of experience in a Network Operations Center (NOC), IT Support, or FinTech operations role. Fresh graduates with exceptional understanding of Linux/Networking and a high sense of responsibility will be considered. • Shift Flexibility: Absolute willingness to work permanent night shifts and remain alert during quiet hours to handle sudden, time-critical emergencies. Technical Skills • Networking Foundations: Strong grasp of TCP/IP, DNS, VPNs, and troubleshooting tools (Ping, MTR, Traceroute, Telnet). • Systems Knowledge: Familiarity with Windows/Linux environments, basic SQL queries (for transaction lookups), and monitoring dashboards (e.g., Zabbix, Grafana, or PRTG). • FinTech Literacy: Understanding of API response codes (200, 404, 500) and the basic flow of a digital payment transaction. • Documentation: High proficiency in professional English/Local language for writing technical incident logs and handover notes. Soft Skills & Behavioral Competencies • Crisis Management: Ability to remain calm and methodical when multiple systems trigger alarms simultaneously. • Sense of Ownership: A "pro-active" rather than "reactive" mindset; taking responsibility for a ticket until it is resolved or officially handed over. • Reliability: Strict punctuality and adherence to operational procedures, recognizing that StarPay’s reputation relies on 100% system uptime. • Communication: Clear, concise communication skills to explain technical issues to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders. Submission Guidelines Interested and qualified national candidates are invited to click the link below and fill in the form completely. submit their applications, including a cover letter and an updated CV , no later than 05 May, 2026 to the link provided below: Admission Link: ( https://forms.gle/jANFWERiLvYSTRwc7 ) Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

expiring_today.title: IT Services Management Assistant
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
The facility of technical support to Branches and HO users by performing remote through Telephone, Ticketing system, and Onsite support.

Duties and Responsibilities
Providing first-level support contact and conveying IT solutions to the branches and HO department’s inquiries and issues.
Properly escalate unresolved queries to the next level of IT support/Unit.
Track, Route, and redirect problems to correct IT resources.
Ensure to Keep updating users/requesters’ Tickets on the Ticketing system.
Walk users through problem-solving processes.
Follow up with users/requesters to provide feedback and see problems through a proper resolution.
Utilize better user service skills and exceed customer’s/requester’s expectations.
Ensure proper recording, documentation, and closures of the reports are in place.
Any other identical tasks assigned by the respective supervisor/s.

Job Requirements
A university degree in IT field or Computer Sciences fields.
A minimum of 2 years’ experience in IT troubleshooting or functional role.
Ability to communicate, written and orally, in English and Dari/Pashto.
Ability to work in a systematic and well-organized manner, with technical skills.
Ability to have IT Troubleshooting, Computer Configurations, and Hardware repair skills.
Ability to Travel in Fields/Provinces where FMFB operates.

Submission Guidelines
If you meet the above requirements, we are encouraging you to apply for this position. Please send us your CV along with a cover letter via email at ( vacancies@fmfb.com.af ).
Please make sure that your email includes the vacancy ID as the subject line.
Note that, only the candidates who are meeting the requirements of the position will be shortlisted.
For more information, Please visit our website: https://www.fmfb.com.af/jobs/it-services-management-assistant/

expiring_today.title: Specialist IT Security
expiring_today.description: Role Summary Specialist IT Security with Etisalat Afghanistan. Duties and Responsibilities • Monitor and analyze network traffic, system activities, and security events to detect potential intrusions, attacks, or vulnerabilities. • Respond to, investigate, and remediate security incidents, ensuring timely resolution and proper escalation where required. • Perform regular risk assessments, vulnerability assessments, and security audits to identify and mitigate potential risks. • Conduct penetration testing and security validation exercises to proactively identify weaknesses in systems, applications, and network infrastructure. • Prepare detailed incident reports, root cause analyses, and recommendations for continuous improvement. • Manage, maintain, and troubleshoot security infrastructure, including firewalls, VPN (SSL/IPsec), encryption systems, DMZ environments, and endpoint protection solutions. • Monitor endpoints using EDR and NDR solutions to detect, analyze, and respond to advanced threats. • Utilize SIEM & SOAR platforms for log monitoring, correlation, and threat detection. • Monitor and secure Active Directory and identity systems using relevant security tools. • Administer and support security solutions such as NAC, PAM, and IAM, including daily operations and troubleshooting. • Integrate network devices and servers (Linux/Windows) with SIEM and other centralized security platforms. • Collaborate with internal teams and attend technical sessions to ensure alignment of security operations and initiatives. • Support the implementation and follow-up of cybersecurity projects and initiatives across the organization. • Promote security awareness by guiding and training staff on cybersecurity best practices. • Stay updated with the latest cybersecurity threats, vulnerabilities, and technologies to enhance the organization’s security posture. • Perform any additional tasks assigned by management in line with organizational objectives. Job Requirements Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field, with at least four years of relevant experience preferred. Submission Guidelines To apply for this vacancy, please use the following link: https://careers.etisalat.af/ Kindly use Google Chrome Browser for smooth access. For further information, please contact us via WhatsApp at +93 (0) 788 887 363.

expiring_soon.title: MSupply/Data entry assistant
expiring_soon.description:
About MHCO
Maihan Humanitarian Convergence Organization (MHCO) is a national non-government, non-political, and non-profit organization registered with the Ministry of Economy, committed to delivering humanitarian services across Afghanistan. MHCO focuses on various sectors including Health, Education, Protection, Nutrition, Livelihoods, Food Security, and Organizational Development.

Job Description
he MSupply/Data Entry Assistant supports the pharmacy department by ensuring accurate and timely entry of stock data into the mSupply system, maintaining proper inventory records, and assisting with reporting, stock monitoring, and documentation. The role contributes to efficient pharmaceutical supply management and ensures compliance with organizational procedures.
Duties and Responsibilities:
Accurately enter and update pharmaceutical data in the mSupply system , including stock receipts, issues, adjustments, and transfers.
Maintain up-to-date records of medicines and medical supplies in both physical and electronic systems.
Verify and cross-check data with stock cards, bin cards, and delivery notes to ensure accuracy.
Monitor stock levels and report low stock, expiries, and discrepancies to the supervisor.
Assist in preparing stock reports, consumption reports, and inventory summaries on a regular basis.
Ensure proper documentation and filing of all pharmacy records, including invoices, waybills, and stock reports.
Support the pharmacy team during stock counts, physical inventory, and audits.
Maintain confidentiality and integrity of all data entered into the system.
Coordinate with warehouse and pharmacy staff to ensure timely data entry of all transactions.
Identify and report any inconsistencies or errors in the system promptly.
Assist in ensuring compliance with organizational policies and donor requirements related to pharmacy and inventory management.
Perform any other related tasks assigned by the supervisor.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Health Sciences, Computer Science , Business Administration, or a related field.
At least 2 –3 years of relevant experience in data entry, pharmacy, or supply chain/warehouse management.
Familiarity with mSupply system or other inventory management software is preferred.
Good knowledge of pharmaceutical products and stock management practices.
Strong data entry skills with high attention to accuracy and detail.
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word) .
Ability to maintain organized records and documentation.
Good communication and coordination skills.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
Understanding of basic reporting and documentation procedures.
Knowledge of English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is required.
Strong sense of integrity, confidentiality, and accountability.
Safeguarding and Recruitment Statement – MHCO
At MHCO, we are firmly committed to maintaining a safe, respectful, and inclusive working environment. We do not tolerate any form of inappropriate behaviour, including sexual harassment, exploitation, abuse, or financial misconduct. The safety and well-being of children, young people, adults, and all beneficiaries we engage with are of paramount importance.
All MHCO staff are expected to uphold these principles in accordance with our Code of Conduct and safeguarding policies. We place strong emphasis on recruiting individuals who demonstrate integrity and align with our organizational values.
The selected candidate for this role will receive comprehensive safeguarding training and will be responsible for understanding and adhering to MHCO’s safeguarding standards. Employment offers are subject to satisfactory references and relevant screening checks, which may include criminal background verification and terrorism finance assessments.
we will request information from previous employers regarding any substantiated findings of sexual exploitation, abuse, or harassment, as well as any ongoing investigations at the time of the candidate’s departure.
By submitting an application, candidates confirm their understanding and acceptance of these recruitment procedures .

Submission Guideline
The interested candidate should submit their complete application (CV/Cover letter) through the link provided below.
Note: Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for written Test/Interview
https://forms.gle/LAH3auLQapGN9BuW8

Submission Email
https://forms.gle/LAH3auLQapGN9BuW8

expiring_soon.title: Chief Information Officer
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Senior Accountant Or Finance Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About Rahat IT Solutions
Rahat IT Solutions is a growing company providing IT, Ecommerce and logistic services and business solutions, focused on efficiency, transparency, and scalable systems.

Job Description
Rahat IT Solutions is seeking a skilled and reliable Senior Accountant / Finance Officer to manage financial operations. The candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, handling transactions, and supporting business decision-making.
Key Responsibilities:
Manage daily accounting and bookkeeping activities
Prepare financial reports (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
Handle accounts payable and receivable
Maintain accurate financial records using Excel, Google sheets or accounting systems
Monitor cash flow and expenses
Ensure compliance with financial procedures
Support management with financial insights

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
Minimum 2–3 years of experience in accounting
Strong skills in Microsoft Excel (important)
Good understanding of financial reporting
High attention to detail and accuracy
Ability to work independently
Good communication skills
Candidate should be based in Kabul
Fluent in Pashto, Dari and English

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should send their CV via:
WhatsApp: +93 79 048 5571
Email: noorullah.developer@gmail.com
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Submission Email
noorullah.developer@gmail.com

details.Education: Bachelor in accounting, finance or related fields
